name: petstore3-client-sample
description: Generated ABAP client for the Swagger Petstore v3 OpenAPI spec. Used as a fixture for @abapify/openai-codegen and as an end-to-end target deployed to a real SAP BTP (Steampunk) system via adt-cli.

scripts.generate: openai-codegen --input ./spec/openapi.json --out ./generated --base petstore3 --format abapgit,gcts --description 'Generated Petstore v3 client'
